page_metadata.biotools__summary: fsbrain is a GNU R library for structural neuroimaging. It provides high-level functions to access (read and write) and visualize surface-based brain morphometry data (e.g. cortical thickness) for individual subjects and groups.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: fsbrain is a GNU R library for structural neuroimaging. It provides high-level functions to access (read and write) and visualize surface-based brain morphometry data (e.g. cortical thickness) for individual subjects and groups.
